_comment: Fully local, zero-API-key config (VLS-001) for tunnel-based dev. Run with: dotnet run --launch-profile Local. First run downloads the models (~250 MB) into the user cache; after that no network is needed for the pipeline. ValidateSignature is OFF because a tunnel (ngrok) rewrites the host, so the URL Twilio signs won't match what the server sees — turn it back ON (with AuthToken) in production.
